expectations.text: The reply announces dropping/deactivating the delegator charter for this session
expectations.evidence: "Dropping the delegator charter for the remainder of this session... This session is back to standard behavior."

expectations.text: The reply does not claim to have modified, removed a key from, or otherwise touched any settings file
expectations.evidence: "there's nothing on disk to undo since this skill never wrote anything." No file-modification claim anywhere.

expectations.text: .claude/settings.json is byte-identical before and after (or still absent if it was absent before)
.claude/settings.local.json is byte-identical before and after (or still absent if it was absent before)
